raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch mehroja to pa-
scho Garrumu diwidesmits Oh-
lektis/ un to Plattumu diwideſ-
mits Ohlektis / us ta Deewa
Namma Preekſchu. Un wiꞥſch
fazzija us man : Schi irr ta wiſ-
fuswehtaka Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch mehroja ta Nam-
ma Seenu teschas Ohlektis/ to
Plattumu ikatra Sahn̄u Kam-
baxa tſchettras Ohlektis wiſap-
kahrt to Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Sahn̄u Kambaxi
bija weens pabr obtru trihsdes-
mits un trihs Sahn̄u Kambaxi/
un tee tatezzeja eekſch tahs See-
nas / kas pee ta Namma bija
preekſch teem Sahn̄u Kamba-
xeein wiſapkahrt / ka tee ſtripri-
taptu turreti/ jo tee ne bija ſtip-
rinatti eekſch ta Namma Seenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Sahn̄u Kambaxi is-
plattijahs jo augſtaki jo natta-
ki/ jo tas Nams tappe allaschin
us augſchu apdarrihts wiſs-
apkahrt/ tapehz tas Nams aug-
schop bija plattaks / un ta btja
no ta leijas Kambaxa ja-eet us to
augſtaku zaur to widdejn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es redſeju ta Namma
Augſtumu wiſsapkahrt/ tee Ba-
matti to Sahn̄u Kambaro bija
vilna Rihſte/ teschas leelas Oh-
lektis no Gemmes lihds augſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahs Seenas Plattums/
kas preekſch teem Sahn̄u Kam-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un starp teem Kamba-
reem bija weena platta Weeta no
diwidesmits Ohlektim wiſsap-
kahrt to Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Sahn̄u Kambaru
Durwis bija pee tahs atlikku-
schas Weetas/ weenas Durwis
prett Seemeka Puſti/ un ohtras
Durwis prett Deenas-Widdus
Puſti/ un tahs atlikkuschas Wee-
tas Plattums bija peezas Ohlek-
tis wiſsapkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No ta Ustaifijuma/ kas
tahs atlikkuschas Weetas
Preekſchu bija prett Waktara
Puſti/ bija tas Plattums ſep-
tindeſmits Ohlekschu/ un ta Us-
taifijuma Seena peezas Ohlek-
tis Refnumā apkahrt/ un wiſ-
na Garrums dewindeſmits Oh-
lekschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad mehroja Wiſsch to
Namnu/ ta Garrums bija ſints
Ohlekschu/ (prohti) ta atlikkusi
Weeta/ un tas Ustaifijums/ un
wiſna Seenas/ bija ſints Oh-
lektis Garrumā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Plattums ta
Namma Preekſch-Galla/ un ta
atlikkufi Weeta prett Rihta
Puſti/ bija arridsan ſints Oh-
lekschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſsch mehroja arridsan
ta Ustaifijuma Garrumu us
tahs atlikkuschaē Weetas Preek-
ſchu / kas pakkat winnu bija /
Rr 3
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
